themes.name: Opening
themes.description: A tactic during the first phase of the game.

themes.name: Middlegame
themes.description: A tactic during the second phase of the game.

themes.name: Endgame
themes.description: A tactic during the last phase of the game.

themes.name: Rook endgame
themes.description: An endgame with only rooks and pawns.

themes.name: Bishop endgame
themes.description: An endgame with only bishops and pawns.

themes.name: Pawn endgame
themes.description: An endgame with only pawns.

themes.name: Knight endgame
themes.description: An endgame with only knights and pawns.

themes.name: Queen endgame
themes.description: An endgame with only queens and pawns.

themes.name: Queen and rook
themes.description: An endgame with only queens, rooks and pawns.

themes.name: Advanced pawn
themes.description: A pawn that advances deep into the opponent's position to threaten promotion.

themes.name: Attacking f2 / f7
themes.description: An attack focused on the f2 or f7 pawn, often during the opening.

themes.name: Attraction
themes.description: Sacrifice or threat that lures an opponent's piece to a vulnerable square.

themes.name: Capture the defender
themes.description: Remove a piece that defends another piece, allowing it to be captured next.

themes.name: Discovered attack
themes.description: Move a piece to reveal an attack from another piece behind it.

themes.name: Double check
themes.description: Two pieces check the king on the same move.

themes.name: Exposed king
themes.description: A king that is missing its pawn shelter is more vulnerable to attack.

themes.name: Fork
themes.description: A move where one piece attacks two opponent pieces at once.

themes.name: Hanging piece
themes.description: An undefended piece that can be captured for free.

themes.name: Kingside attack
themes.description: An attack on the opponent's king on the kingside.

themes.name: Pin
themes.description: A piece that cannot move without exposing a more valuable piece behind it.

themes.name: Queenside attack
themes.description: An attack on the opponent's king after it has castled queenside.

themes.name: Sacrifice
themes.description: Give up material short-term to gain a stronger advantage.

themes.name: Skewer
themes.description: Attack a valuable piece, forcing it to move and exposing a less valuable piece behind.

themes.name: Trapped piece
themes.description: A piece with no escape squares, ready to be captured.

themes.name: Deflection
themes.description: Force a defender off a key square or duty.

themes.name: Decoy
themes.description: Lure an opponent's piece onto a square where it becomes vulnerable.

themes.name: Interference
themes.description: Place a piece between two of your opponent's pieces, breaking their coordination.

themes.name: Zwischenzug
themes.description: Insert an unexpected move that's stronger than continuing the obvious line.

themes.name: X-ray attack
themes.description: An attack through one piece to another.

themes.name: Defensive move
themes.description: Find the precise move to defend a worse position.

themes.name: Quiet move
themes.description: A move that's not a check or capture but creates devastating threats.

themes.name: Zugzwang
themes.description: Any move worsens the position — but the player must move.

themes.name: Advantage
themes.description: Seize your chance to get a decisive advantage. (200cp ≤ eval ≤ 600cp)

themes.name: Crushing
themes.description: Spot the opponent's blunder and convert your overwhelming advantage. (eval ≥ 600cp)

themes.name: Equality
themes.description: Find the right move to escape and equalize a losing position. (eval ≤ 200cp)

themes.name: Promotion
themes.description: Promote a pawn to gain decisive material.

themes.name: Underpromotion
themes.description: Promote to a knight, bishop, or rook for tactical reasons.

themes.name: Castling
themes.description: Castle to safety and start a counterattack.

themes.name: En passant
themes.description: A pawn-capture rule that arises only after a 2-square pawn move.

themes.name: Checkmate
themes.description: Win the game with style.

themes.name: Mate in 1
themes.description: Deliver checkmate in one move.

themes.name: Mate in 2
themes.description: Deliver checkmate in 2 moves.

themes.name: Mate in 3
themes.description: Deliver checkmate in 3 moves.

themes.name: Mate in 4
themes.description: Deliver checkmate in 4 moves.

themes.name: Mate in 5+
themes.description: Figure out a long mating sequence.

themes.name: Back rank mate
themes.description: Checkmate the king on the home rank, when blocked by its own pieces.

themes.name: Anastasia's mate
themes.description: Knight and rook (or queen) trap the king between the rim and a friendly piece.

themes.name: Arabian mate
themes.description: Knight and rook combine to mate the king on a corner square.

themes.name: Boden's mate
themes.description: Two crossing bishops deliver mate to a castled king blocked by friendly pieces.

themes.name: Double bishop mate
themes.description: Two bishops on adjacent diagonals deliver mate to a castled king.

themes.name: Dovetail mate
themes.description: A queen mates the king with the king's escape squares blocked by friendly pieces.

themes.name: Hook mate
themes.description: Rook, knight, and pawn combine to trap the king on the rim.

themes.name: Kill box mate
themes.description: Rook and queen trap the king in a 3×3 box.

themes.name: Smothered mate
themes.description: A knight delivers mate to a king completely blocked in by friendly pieces.

themes.name: Vukovic mate
themes.description: A rook supported by a knight mates the king on the rim.

themes.name: One-move puzzle
themes.description: A puzzle that solves in a single move.

themes.name: Short puzzle
themes.description: Two-move puzzle.

themes.name: Long puzzle
themes.description: Three-move puzzle.

themes.name: Very long puzzle
themes.description: Four moves or more to solve.

themes.name: Master games
themes.description: Puzzles from games played by titled players.

themes.name: Master vs master
themes.description: Both players in the source game are titled.

themes.name: Super GM games
themes.description: Puzzles from games played by the world's best players.

themes.name: Player games
themes.description: Puzzles from games played on Lichess by players in the source database.
